query:
ALTER TABLE brand_livestreams 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS beforeScreenshotUrl TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS beforeScreenshotKey VARCHAR(512),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS manualSalesAmount BIGINT;
